languages.text: "Последний озвученный тезис великолепно объясняет, почему ваши попытки коммуницировать с мирянами столь плачевно неэффективны, коллега".
"Your latest thesis perfectly explains why your attempts to communicate with the laity are so woefully ineffective, colleague."
languages.original_text: "Последний озвученный тезис великолепно объясняет, почему ваши попытки коммуницировать с мирянами столь плачевно неэффективны, коллега".

traits.locale_text: "Your latest thesis perfectly explains why your attempts to communicate with the laity are so woefully ineffective, colleague."
"Your latest thesis perfectly explains why your attempts to communicate with the laity are so woefully ineffective, colleague."
"Your latest thesis perfectly explains why your attempts to communicate with the laity are so woefully ineffective, colleague."

languages.text: «Su tesis más reciente explica perfectamente la poca eficacia de sus intentos de comunicarse con los laicos, mi querido colega».
languages.original_text: "Your latest thesis perfectly explains why your attempts to communicate with the laity are so woefully ineffective, colleague."

traits.locale_text: «Su tesis más reciente explica perfectamente la poca eficacia de sus intentos de comunicarse con los laicos, mi querido colega».

languages.text: “你最近发表的那篇论文，正好完美解释了为什么你与教外人士的沟通总是如此可悲地缺乏成效，同僚。”
languages.original_text: "Your latest thesis perfectly explains why your attempts to communicate with the laity are so woefully ineffective, colleague."

traits.locale_text: “你最近发表的那篇论文，正好完美解释了为什么你与教外人士的沟通总是如此可悲地缺乏成效，同僚。”

languages.text: « Ce que vous venez de dire explique parfaitement pourquoi vos tentatives de communication avec les profanes sont aussi inefficaces. »
languages.original_text: "Your latest thesis perfectly explains why your attempts to communicate with the laity are so woefully ineffective, colleague."

traits.locale_text: « Ce que vous venez de dire explique parfaitement pourquoi vos tentatives de communication avec les profanes sont aussi inefficaces. »

languages.text: "Son tezin, sıradan insanlarla iletişim kurma çabalarının neden böylesine acınası derecede etkisiz olduğunu mükemmel bir şekilde açıklıyor meslektaşım."
languages.original_text: "Your latest thesis perfectly explains why your attempts to communicate with the laity are so woefully ineffective, colleague."

traits.locale_text: "Son tezin, sıradan insanlarla iletişim kurma çabalarının neden böylesine acınası derecede etkisiz olduğunu mükemmel bir şekilde açıklıyor meslektaşım."

languages.text: 「あなたの最新の論題は、あなたが世俗の者と意思を通わせようとする試みがなぜこれほど嘆かわしく非効率なのかを、見事に説明していますね、同僚」
languages.original_text: "Your latest thesis perfectly explains why your attempts to communicate with the laity are so woefully ineffective, colleague."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたの最新の論題は、あなたが世俗の者と意思を通わせようとする試みがなぜこれほど嘆かわしく非効率なのかを、見事に説明していますね、同僚」

languages.text: "Eure neueste These erklärt perfekt, warum Eure Kommunikationsversuche mit dem Laienstand so schrecklich ineffektiv sind, Kollege."
languages.original_text: "Your latest thesis perfectly explains why your attempts to communicate with the laity are so woefully ineffective, colleague."

traits.locale_text: "Eure neueste These erklärt perfekt, warum Eure Kommunikationsversuche mit dem Laienstand so schrecklich ineffektiv sind, Kollege."
